overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a player walking through The Viceroy hotel resort entrance at dusk, passing NPCs near the entrance, and examining parked luxury sports cars in the side parking lot.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the hotel entrance sign through the open parking lot

multi-story resort building with lit windows and green roof accents
tall palm trees flanking the entrance driveway
low building with garage doors and green trim roof

segments.scene_description: The player approaches The Viceroy hotel resort at dusk through an open asphalt parking lot. The large illuminated sign dominates the center view while palm trees frame the entrance driveway.

passing by NPCs standing near the entrance doors

group of people conversing near the glass doors

large glass doors with illuminated vertical light fixtures inside
red carpet runner leading to entrance doors
large potted evergreen trees flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: The player enters the covered hotel portico, transitioning from outdoor dusk to artificially lit shelter. The red carpet leads to glass entrance doors while a few NPCs stand around the entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to side parking garage

events.description: exiting covered walkway into side parking area with garage doors

black two-door sports car parked near garage
hotel sign visible again in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway into a side parking area featuring garage doors and parked sports cars. The hotel sign remains visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: side parking lot with luxury vehicles

events.description: approaching and circling the parked black sports cars to examine them
turning back toward the main hotel entrance while passing the convertible

agents.ego_description: examining the parked luxury sports cars by walking around them and inspecting details

entered.detail: black Audi R8 with silver rims parked by garage door
black convertible sports car with top down near hedge wall
tall green hedge forming boundary of parking area

segments.scene_description: The player explores the side parking lot, closely examining a black Audi R8 and a black convertible roadster. The camera circles the vehicles before turning back toward the main hotel entrance, with The Viceroy sign visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the open approach of a luxury hotel resort into its sheltered entrance and finally into a private parking area. It begins in an open asphalt lot at dusk, moving toward the large illuminated sign of The Viceroy framed by towering palm trees. As the camera enters the covered portico, the natural twilight shifts to artificial lighting, passing by NPCs and following a red carpet toward the glass entrance doors. The scene then opens back up as the camera exits the walkway into a side parking area featuring garage doors, with the hotel sign receding into the distant background. Finally, the movement slows to closely examine a black Audi R8 and a black convertible roadster before turning back toward the main entrance.
